blended.narrative: Vail is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,242 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 23".
